summary: Stellar audience tape with a perfectly balanced mix; the show is broadly praised and highly recommended.
review: The reviewer lauds this October‑1982 Frost recording as an exemplary audience capture, noting that every instrument and vocal is present and evenly balanced – essentially “stellar” sound quality. While no specific songs are called out, the overall performance is described in glowing terms, prompting a strong recommendation to acquire the show.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one detailed review; it gives a perfect score for the recording and expresses enthusiastic approval of the performance, leading to a high rating despite limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: All instruments and vocals present and evenly balanced; described as "stellar" with no noted flaws.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Generally praised; reviewer recommends the show without mentioning any weak spots.
